layout.title: List Specific Events
layout.message: List all future Events of the chosen type

field.name: event_type_id
field.query: SELECT `id`, `description`, `ordering` FROM #__ra_event_types WHERE state=1 AND (id IN ('2', '3', '4','5')) UNION SELECT 0 AS `id`, 'All types' AS `description` , 0 AS `ordering`ORDER BY `ordering`
field.label: Select type
